title: Fix review issues: Fire Dragon server-side + remove redundant useEffect
description: Address issues 1 and 2 from the 2026-07-08 review: (1) Import and call applyFireDragonEffect in the server SUBMIT_WAR_BIDS handler before determineTacticWinners; (2) Remove the redundant safety-net useEffect in BattleBiddingOverlay that watches coinPositions.
steps: Add applyFireDragonEffect to the import list in src/server/index.ts
Call applyFireDragonEffect(l.gameState, provinceId) before determineTacticWinners in SUBMIT_WAR_BIDS handler
Remove the redundant useEffect that watches coinPositions in BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx
Run npm run build to verify
